name: Titan Roofing and Construction
tagline: Looking for a reliable roofing contractor? Titan Roofing offers quality roofing services in Santa Rosa, CA
seoDescription: Looking for a reliable roofing contractor? Titan Roofing offers quality roofing services in Santa Rosa, CA. Contact us today for a free quote.

sections.heading: Honest roofing across Santa Rosa, CA
sections.subheading: Call 707-495-8685 or fill out the form to the right to speak with our friendly roofing staff.

sections.heading: About Titan Roofing and Construction
body: Call 707-495-8685 or fill out the form to the right to speak with our friendly roofing staff.

Your Santa Rosa, CA roof is an important part of your home, and if you feel that there is a problem with it it’s vital that you have it looked at as soon as possible. But it’s not easy to know what you’re looking at, and it can also be dangerous for the average person.
